title: Implement Custom Transform Streams
description: Implement custom Transform streams using `_read`, `_write`, and `_transform` methods. Manage internal buffer states to maintain proper backpressure signaling in custom streams. Design flexible data transformation pipelines using custom stream implementations.
objectives: Implement custom Transform streams using `_read`, `_write`, and `_transform` methods.
Manage internal buffer states to maintain proper backpressure signaling in custom streams.
Design flexible data transformation pipelines using custom stream implementations.
